description: arXiv:2607.13639v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce OvisOCR2, a 0.8B document parsing model. OvisOCR2 is designed as an end-to-end parser: given a document page image, it generates a Markdown representation in natural reading order, covering text, formulas, tables, and visual regions. We build a data engine that combines filtered real-document annotations with synthetic pages whose r...
author: Shiyin Lu, Yinglun Li, Yu Xia, Yuhui Chen, An-Yang Ji, Jun-Peng Jiang, Qing-Guo Chen, Jianshan Zhao, En Lin, Haijun Li, Cheng Qin, Zhao Xu, Weihua Luo
